purpose: Tighten phase-06 profile evidence onto focused profile route endpoints.

set.targetBehavior: `profile_route_service.cj` now centralizes the profile-specific back-route decision, placeholder action message, and logout reset state, while `renderProfileRoute` preserves the visible back affordance, static action cards, and logout button. `bootstrap_page.cj` now delegates that profile wiring to focused profile endpoints before routing to onboarding after session logout.
verificationEvidence: Manual source review confirmed `Profile.kt` owns the back icon, edit/action-card click surfaces, and logout navigation callback.

Manual target review confirmed `profile_route_service.cj::canNavigateBack`, `::resetAfterLogout`, and `::placeholderActionMessage` now carry the profile-specific command wiring instead of closing the row through only the broad bootstrap shell.
`profile_page.cj::buildProfileTopBar` and `::renderProfileRoute` preserve the visible back/logout/action-card surface while `app_router.cj::resolveProfileBackRoute` remains the stack resolver.
Phase-06 test build report PASS: `translation-inputs/test-build-reports/phase-06-profile-capabilities-verification/test-build-report.md` ran `cjpm test --target aarch64-linux-ohos` successfully.
Phase-06 build gate PASS: `translation-inputs/build-reports/phase-06-profile-capabilities-verification/build-report.md`.
Manual source review confirmed `Profile.kt` contains no permission launcher, activity result, gallery picker, or protected API call.

Manual target review confirmed `profile_route_service.cj::placeholderActionMessage`, `profile_page.cj::buildProfileTopBar`, and `profile_page.cj::renderProfileRoute` only use route callbacks and placeholder toasts.
Phase-06 test build report PASS: `translation-inputs/test-build-reports/phase-06-profile-capabilities-verification/test-build-report.md` ran `cjpm test --target aarch64-linux-ohos` successfully.
Phase-06 build gate PASS: `translation-inputs/build-reports/phase-06-profile-capabilities-verification/build-report.md`.

set.targetBehavior: `profile_route_service.cj` now owns the profile-specific callback decisions for back eligibility, placeholder action feedback, and logout reset state, while `profile_store.cj` centralizes the static identity and placeholder-action message. `renderProfileRoute` remains a thin UI surface over those focused state endpoints without inventing editable or remote profile data.
verificationEvidence: Manual source review confirmed the profile screen is driven by callback wiring rather than editable form state or remote data streams.

Manual target review confirmed `profile_route_service.cj`, `profile_store.cj`, and `profile_page.cj::renderProfileRoute` now carry the translated profile callback/state surface more precisely than the root bootstrap shell alone.
Phase-06 test build report PASS: `translation-inputs/test-build-reports/phase-06-profile-capabilities-verification/test-build-report.md` ran `cjpm test --target aarch64-linux-ohos` successfully.
Phase-06 build gate PASS: `translation-inputs/build-reports/phase-06-profile-capabilities-verification/build-report.md`.

set.targetBehavior: `profile_route_service.cj::resetAfterLogout` now owns the translated profile-route teardown state, while `resolveStartRoute(false)` preserves the post-logout entry behavior that returns the app to onboarding.
verificationEvidence: Manual source review confirmed `ProfileViewModel.kt` contains no initialization or resume logic beyond logout handling.
Manual target review confirmed `profile_route_service.cj::resetAfterLogout` captures the translated route teardown state and `resolveStartRoute(false)` returns the onboarding route.
Phase-06 test build report PASS: `translation-inputs/test-build-reports/phase-06-profile-capabilities-verification/test-build-report.md` ran `cjpm test --target aarch64-linux-ohos` successfully.
Phase-06 build gate PASS: `translation-inputs/build-reports/phase-06-profile-capabilities-verification/build-report.md`.

set.targetBehavior: `profile_store.cj::logout` preserves the translated persisted-session mutation, `profile_route_service.cj::resetAfterLogout` captures the immediate local route-state reset, and `resolveStartRoute(false)` preserves the resulting onboarding entry state after logout.
verificationEvidence: Manual source review confirmed `ProfileViewModel.kt` performs a single logout state mutation followed by the supplied callback.

Manual target review confirmed `profile_store.cj::logout`, `profile_route_service.cj::resetAfterLogout`, and `app_router.cj::resolveStartRoute` now separate the translated mutation, local reset, and startup-resolution responsibilities.
Phase-06 test build report PASS: `translation-inputs/test-build-reports/phase-06-profile-capabilities-verification/test-build-report.md` ran `cjpm test --target aarch64-linux-ohos` successfully.
Phase-06 build gate PASS: `translation-inputs/build-reports/phase-06-profile-capabilities-verification/build-report.md`.

set.targetBehavior: The target replaces this shallow source-side smoke test with focused Cangjie verification for profile back/logout routing and startup-route resolution in `phase06_profile_capabilities_verification_test.cj`, backed by a passing phase-06 test gate and the precise profile route service/router/store endpoints.
